summary: Structural review of envelope auto-injection: all 6 verification points pass. Shared helper in lib/envelope.ts with registry-based config. Injection correctly placed BEFORE validate() in all 4 commands (task create, mission write-spec, mission write-brief, phase write). No-clobber semantics correct (undefined check). Evidence command untouched (trust boundary preserved). created_at/updated_at not touched. status=drafted enforced at command level in task.ts, not in envelope. Minor deviation: function returns data instead of void per design guide, but functionally harmless.
concerns: Return type deviation from design guide (void vs Record) - non-blocking
